tools.name: currentGlobalTime.getglobaltime
tools.description: Gets the current time for a global locale (city, state, region, or country such as Chicago, London, Paris, Seoul, Spain, Buenos Aires, Hawaii, Moscow, Tokyo, Hanoi, etc.)
